dataset.name: Genome-scale Perturb-seq in primary human CD4+ T cells
dataset.citation: Zhu, Dann, Yan, Reyes Retana, Goto, Guitche, Petersen, Ota, Pritchard, Marson (2025). bioRxiv 2025.12.23.696273.
dataset.note: Field descriptions from data_sharing_readme.md; CSV profiles and .h5ad/.h5mu structure read from the actual downloaded files.

condition.role: crossed context facet (biology, not just error)
condition.note: Fixed facet: report both cross-condition (broad) and within-condition (context-specific) dependability.

effect_and_SE.reliability_correlations: DE_stats.h5ad .obs (guide_correlation_*, donor_correlation_*) — NOT in the flat CSV

known_gaps: DE_stats.suppl_table.csv is a reduced 16-col release: it lacks guide_correlation_*, donor_correlation_*, n_guides, single_guide_estimate, neighboring_gene_KD, distal_offtarget_flag. Those live in GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad .obs (now downloaded).
guide_kd_efficiency + several suppl tables are on the companion GitHub repo (emdann/GWT_perturbseq_analysis_2025), not this S3 bucket — the only product not downloaded.
Two guides / four donors -> per-target variance components under-identified; the full G-study uses partial-pooling REML (see docs/design.md / issue #2).

sample_metadata.suppl_table.csv.description: Per-sample experimental metadata + donor demographics (one row per donor x condition x run).

fields.name: cell_sample_id
fields.description: Unique biological sample identifier.

fields.name: 10xrun_id
fields.description: Processing batch / run identifier (R1 or R2).

fields.name: donor_id
fields.description: Donor facet identifier (4 donors).

fields.name: culture_condition
fields.description: Stimulation condition facet: Rest / Stim8hr / Stim48hr.

fields.name: library_id
fields.description: Sequencing library identifier (matches cellranger outputs).

fields.name: probe_hyb_loading
fields.example: 2M cells/probe, 40uL GEX probe, BC001-004, CRISPR probe, ...

fields.name: age
fields.description: Donor age (years).

fields.name: sex
fields.description: Donor sex.

fields.name: ethnicity
fields.description: Donor ethnicity.

DE_stats.suppl_table.csv.description: Per-(target x condition) differential-expression summary. REDUCED 16-col release: effect magnitude + basic QC only; reliability correlation fields are NOT here (see DE_stats.h5ad .obs).

fields.name: index
fields.description: Observation key `{target_contrast}_{culture_condition}`.

fields.name: target_contrast_gene_name
fields.description: Symbol of the perturbed gene.

fields.name: culture_condition
fields.description: Stimulation condition facet: Rest / Stim8hr / Stim48hr.

fields.name: target_contrast
fields.description: Ensembl gene ID of the perturbed gene (object of measurement).

fields.name: chunk
fields.description: DE processing group identifier.

fields.name: n_cells_target
fields.description: Number of cells with a targeting guide for this perturbation.

fields.name: n_up_genes
fields.description: Count of significantly upregulated genes (10% FDR).

fields.name: n_down_genes
fields.description: Count of significantly downregulated genes (10% FDR).

fields.name: n_total_de_genes
fields.description: Total significantly DE genes at 10% FDR (a candidate E_t).

fields.name: ontarget_effect_size
fields.description: Effect size of the perturbation on its intended target gene.

fields.name: ontarget_significant
fields.description: On-target knockdown significant (10% FDR)?

fields.name: target_baseMean
fields.description: Mean baseline expression of the target gene.

fields.name: offtarget_flag
fields.description: Potential off-target effect flag (reduced-CSV consolidation of neighboring/distal flags).

fields.name: n_total_genes_category
fields.description: Category based on number of trans-effects.

fields.name: ontarget_effect_category
fields.description: Categorical label of on-target knockdown outcome.

fields.name: n_downstream
fields.description: Downstream (trans) DE genes, excluding the on-target effect.

sgrna_library_metadata.suppl_table.csv.description: Per-sgRNA guide library: genomic target, design, off-target neighbours (guide -> gene mapping; the guide facet's definition).

fields.name: sgRNA
fields.description: Unique sgRNA guide identifier (the guide facet).

fields.name: chromosome
fields.description: Chromosome of the guide target site.

fields.name: note
fields.example: unique alignment, aligned to target gene

fields.name: seq
fields.description: Full guide RNA sequence.

fields.name: designed_target_gene_name
fields.description: Intended target gene (as designed).

fields.name: target_gene_id
fields.description: Ensembl ID of the validated target gene for this guide.

fields.name: target_gene_name
fields.description: Validated target gene symbol for this guide.

fields.name: distance_to_closest_target_tss
fields.description: Distance (bp) from guide to the closest target TSS.

fields.name: putative_bidirectional_promoter
fields.description: Guide may hit a bidirectional promoter (multi-gene risk).

GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad.why_needed: Primary MVP driver. .obs holds the RELIABILITY fields absent from the reduced CSV; .layers holds the genome-wide effect vectors per target x condition.

obs_fields.name: chunk
obs_fields.description: DE processing group identifier.

obs_fields.name: culture_condition
obs_fields.description: Stimulation condition facet: Rest / Stim8hr / Stim48hr.

obs_fields.name: distal_offtarget_flag
obs_fields.description: Potential distal off-target (predicted alignment + down-regulation).

obs_fields.name: donor_correlation_all_mean
obs_fields.description: Mean over donor-pair Pearson r of per-gene DE logFC (all genes). -> first-pass R_donor.

obs_fields.name: donor_correlation_all_min
obs_fields.description: Min over donor-pairs (conservative R_donor).

obs_fields.name: donor_correlation_hits_mean
obs_fields.description: Mean cross-donor r on per-target hit genes.

obs_fields.name: donor_correlation_hits_min
obs_fields.description: Min cross-donor r on hit genes.

obs_fields.name: guide_correlation_all
obs_fields.description: Pearson r between the two guides' per-gene DE z-scores, all genes. NaN if only one guide. -> first-pass R_guide.

obs_fields.name: guide_correlation_all_pval
obs_fields.description: p-value for guide_correlation_all.

obs_fields.name: guide_correlation_signif
obs_fields.description: Same guide correlation, restricted to significant DE genes.

obs_fields.name: guide_correlation_signif_pval
obs_fields.description: p-value for guide_correlation_signif.

obs_fields.name: guide_n_signif_ontarget
obs_fields.description: Number of guides with a significant on-target effect.

obs_fields.name: index
obs_fields.description: Observation key `{target_contrast}_{culture_condition}`.

obs_fields.name: low_target_gex
obs_fields.description: Target gene low baseline expression (KD estimate unreliable).

obs_fields.name: n_cells_target
obs_fields.description: Number of cells with a targeting guide for this perturbation.

obs_fields.name: n_down_genes
obs_fields.description: Count of significantly downregulated genes (10% FDR).

obs_fields.name: n_downstream
obs_fields.description: Downstream (trans) DE genes, excluding the on-target effect.

obs_fields.name: n_guides
obs_fields.description: Number of guides aggregated into the per-target DE estimate.

obs_fields.name: n_total_de_genes
obs_fields.description: Total significantly DE genes at 10% FDR (a candidate E_t).

obs_fields.name: n_total_genes_category
obs_fields.description: Category based on number of trans-effects.

obs_fields.name: n_up_genes
obs_fields.description: Count of significantly upregulated genes (10% FDR).

obs_fields.name: neighboring_gene_KD
obs_fields.description: Adjacent gene also knocked down (cis off-target).

obs_fields.name: ontarget_effect_size
obs_fields.description: Effect size of the perturbation on its intended target gene.

obs_fields.name: ontarget_significant
obs_fields.description: On-target knockdown significant (10% FDR)?

obs_fields.name: single_guide_estimate
obs_fields.description: DE estimate came from a single guide only.

obs_fields.name: target_baseMean
obs_fields.description: Mean baseline expression of the target gene.

obs_fields.name: target_contrast
obs_fields.description: Ensembl gene ID of the perturbed gene (object of measurement).

obs_fields.name: target_contrast_gene_name
obs_fields.description: Symbol of the perturbed gene.

layer_fields.name: baseMean
layer_fields.description: Mean normalized expression per gene (DE baseline).

layer_fields.name: lfcSE
layer_fields.description: Standard error of log fold change (the SE the G-study needs).

layer_fields.name: log_fc
layer_fields.description: Log2 fold change (per perturbation x gene).

layer_fields.name: zscore
layer_fields.description: DE z-score = logFC / lfcSE (the effect-profile vector).

GWCD4i.DE_stats.by_guide.h5mu.why_needed: Per-guide DE effect vectors (one modality per guide) -> raw material to FIT the guide variance component, not just read a precomputed correlation.

guide_kd_efficiency.suppl_table.csv.size: small (companion GitHub repo emdann/GWT_perturbseq_analysis_2025, NOT this S3 bucket)
guide_kd_efficiency.suppl_table.csv.why_needed: Per-guide knockdown efficiency (t-statistic vs NTC) -> feeds Q_t.

documented_fields.name: t_statistic
documented_fields.description: Welch t comparing guide vs NTC target expression (negative = knockdown).

documented_fields.name: high_confidence_no_effect_guides
documented_fields.description: Guide with high-confidence no knockdown effect.
